src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-report-creation-001 title: successful report creation with image and entity assignment module: report submission source files or pages: 4 covered methods: preconditions: - user is logged in. - firebasefirestore and firebasestorage are active. - at least one area and category exist in the database. test data: - description: `broken streetlight on maple ave` - image: `streetlight.jpg` (valid file) - coordinates: `40.7128, -74.0060` (new york) - urgency: `high` - assigned category: `infrastructure` - assigned area: `manhattan` test steps: 1. user enters report details (description, image, coordinates, urgency) in the ui. 2. ui uploads `immagine` to firebasestorage. 3. firebasestorage returns `url immagine salvata`. 4. ui sends `cerca ente competente più vicino(coordinate, urgenza)` to firebasefirestore. 5. firebasefirestore returns `ente più vicino trovato (dati ente)`. 6. ui sends `salvasegnalazione(datisegnalazione + url immagine + dati ente)` to firebasefirestore. 7. firebasefirestore confirms `conferma salvataggio segnalazione`. 8. ui displays: *"conferma invio segnalazione con ente assegnato"*. expected result: - report record is created in firebasefirestore with: - `iduser`, `idcategorie`, `idarea`, `urgency`, `description`, and `imageurl`. - assigned entity data is linked. - image is stored in firebasestorage. unit: project:
